name: DevDX_Extensions_WorkareaHost
label: Workarea Host
description: Defines a panel as the workarea container. Place this in the right panel of a layout. Anything opened with containerName 'workarea' will appear here.

properties.name: emptyStateMessage
properties.label: Empty state message
properties.defaultValue: No active work item. Create or open a case to get started.

defaultConfig.emptyStateMessage: No active work item. Create or open a case to get started.
